properties.name: id
properties.description: Unique event identifier for each logon or logoff event

properties.name: date
properties.description: Timestamp when the logon or logoff event occurred, in MM/DD/YYYY HH:MM:SS format

properties.name: user
properties.description: User identifier of the person who logged on or off, in format UXXXX

properties.name: pc
properties.description: Computer or workstation identifier that the user logged into or out of

properties.name: activity
properties.description: Type of authentication event: either Logon (session start) or Logoff (session end)

properties.name: id
properties.description: Unique event identifier for each HTTP request

properties.name: date
properties.description: Timestamp when the HTTP request was made, in MM/DD/YYYY HH:MM:SS format

properties.name: user
properties.description: User identifier of the person who made the web request, in format UXXXX

properties.name: pc
properties.description: Computer from which the HTTP request originated

properties.name: url
properties.description: Full URL of the website or resource accessed

properties.name: content_type
properties.description: MIME content type of the HTTP response

properties.name: bytes_transferred
properties.description: Number of bytes transferred in the HTTP response

properties.name: id
properties.description: Unique event identifier for each email

properties.name: date
properties.description: Timestamp when the email was sent, in MM/DD/YYYY HH:MM:SS format

properties.name: user
properties.description: User identifier of the person who sent the email, in format UXXXX

properties.name: pc
properties.description: Computer from which the email was sent

properties.name: to_addresses
properties.description: Semicolon-separated list of recipient email addresses in the To field

properties.name: cc_addresses
properties.description: Semicolon-separated list of CC recipient email addresses

properties.name: bcc_addresses
properties.description: Semicolon-separated list of BCC recipient email addresses

properties.name: from_address
properties.description: Email address of the sender in user@acmecorp.com format

properties.name: size_bytes
properties.description: Total size of the email message in bytes including attachments

properties.name: has_attachments
properties.description: Whether the email contains file attachments

properties.name: attachment_count
properties.description: Number of file attachments on the email, 0 if none

properties.name: call_id
properties.description: Unique identifier for each Teams call or meeting

properties.name: call_date
properties.description: Date and time when the Teams call started, in YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS format

properties.name: organizer_email
properties.description: Email address of the person who organized or initiated the call

properties.name: duration_minutes
properties.description: Length of the call in minutes from first participant join to last participant leave

properties.name: participant_count
properties.description: Total number of participants who joined the call

properties.name: call_type
properties.description: Type of communication: audio (voice only), video (camera on), or screen_share

properties.name: department
properties.description: Department of the call organizer

properties.name: meeting_id
properties.description: Unique identifier for each Zoom meeting

properties.name: meeting_start
properties.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the Zoom meeting started

properties.name: host
properties.description: Email address of the meeting host

properties.name: length_minutes
properties.description: Duration of the meeting in minutes

properties.name: attendees
properties.description: Array of email addresses for all meeting attendees including the host

properties.name: meeting_type
properties.description: How the meeting was created: instant (ad-hoc), scheduled (planned), or recurring (repeating)

properties.name: recording_available
properties.description: Whether a recording of the meeting was saved

properties.name: org_unit
properties.description: Organizational unit or department of the meeting host

properties.name: employee_id
properties.description: Employee identifier in the legacy HR system, in format EMP-XXXX

properties.name: name
properties.description: Full name of the employee

properties.name: department
properties.description: Department the employee belongs to

properties.name: job_role
properties.description: Job title or role of the employee

properties.name: hire_date
properties.description: Date the employee was hired, in YYYY-MM-DD format

properties.name: termination_date
properties.description: Date the employee left the company, empty if still employed

properties.name: salary
properties.description: Annual base salary in USD as of the snapshot date

properties.name: performance_rating
properties.description: Annual performance rating on an integer scale of 1 (lowest) to 5 (highest)

properties.name: years_at_company
properties.description: Number of years the employee has been with the company as of the snapshot date

properties.name: overtime_flag
properties.description: Whether the employee worked overtime during the snapshot period: Y or N

properties.name: snapshot_date
properties.description: Date of the annual HR data snapshot, in YYYY-MM-DD format

properties.name: worker_id
properties.description: Worker identifier in the modern HCM system, in format WKR-XXXX

properties.name: full_name
properties.description: Full name of the worker

properties.name: business_unit
properties.description: Business unit the worker belongs to (equivalent to department)

properties.name: position_title
properties.description: Current job title or position of the worker

properties.name: start_date
properties.description: Date the worker started employment, in YYYY-MM-DD format

properties.name: end_date
properties.description: Date the worker's employment ended, null if still active

properties.name: base_compensation
properties.description: Annual base compensation in USD as of the effective date

properties.name: performance_score
properties.description: Performance score on a continuous scale from 0.0 (lowest) to 5.0 (highest)

properties.name: engagement_index
properties.description: Employee engagement score from 0 (disengaged) to 100 (highly engaged), derived from pulse surveys

properties.name: skills
properties.description: Array of skill tags associated with the worker

properties.name: manager_worker_id
properties.description: Worker ID of this person's direct manager

properties.name: learning_completions
properties.description: Number of learning courses or training modules completed in the quarter

properties.name: effective_date
properties.description: Date this quarterly snapshot was captured, in YYYY-MM-DD format

properties.name: ticket_key
properties.description: Unique ticket identifier in PROJECT-NUMBER format

properties.name: summary
properties.description: Brief one-line summary of the issue or task
sample_values: Fix api error handling for edge cases

properties.name: description
properties.description: Detailed description of the issue, task, or feature request
sample_values: Detailed description for ENG-142: Fix api error handling

properties.name: status
properties.description: Current workflow status of the ticket

properties.name: priority
properties.description: Priority level of the ticket

properties.name: assignee_email
properties.description: Email address of the person assigned to work on this ticket

properties.name: reporter_email
properties.description: Email address of the person who created this ticket

properties.name: project
properties.description: Project code this ticket belongs to

properties.name: sprint
properties.description: Sprint or iteration this ticket is assigned to

properties.name: created_date
properties.description: Date the ticket was created, in YYYY-MM-DD format

properties.name: resolved_date
properties.description: Date the ticket was resolved or closed, empty if still open

properties.name: story_points
properties.description: Estimated effort in story points using Fibonacci scale

properties.name: labels
properties.description: Comma-separated categorization labels

properties.name: components
properties.description: Comma-separated software components affected by this ticket
